div.div: Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu

Fascinated by murder and all things macabre, Kyoutarou daydreams of acting out his twisted fantasies on his unsuspecting classmates — but an encounter with Anna Yamada, the gorgeous class idol, lights a spark in the darkness of his heart. It’s a classic tale of an antisocial boy falling for a popular girl, but neither are who they appear to be at first glance. Will Kyoutarou and Anna defy their expectations of each other — and of themselves?
(Source: HIDIVE)

Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Jujutsu High, a school where fledgling exorcists learn how to combat curses. Gojo convinces Yuta to enroll, but can he learn enough in time to confront the curse that haunts him?
(Source: VIZ Media)
Comedy, Sci-Fi, Slice of Life, Supernatural

The comedy manga centers around a super-powered girl named Hina and Nitta, a young member of the yakuza. Hina suddenly appears in Nitta's room and threatens him with her extraordinary powers. However, they end up living together.
(Source: Anime News Network)

Although Yuji Itadori looks like your average teenager, his immense physical strength is something to behold! Every sports club wants him to join, but Itadori would rather hang out with the school outcasts in the Occult Research Club. One day, the club manages to get their hands on a sealed cursed object. Little do they know the terror they’ll unleash when they break the seal… (Source: VIZ Media) Notes: - Ranked 1st in Japan's Bookstore Employees Top Manga of 2018. - Nominated for the 25th Annual Tezuka Osamu Cultural Prize in 2021. - Nominated for the 65th Shogakukan Manga Award in the Shounen Category in 2019. - Includes one extra chapter.

Timid Tadano is a total wallflower, and that’s just the way he likes it. But all that changes when he finds himself alone in a classroom on the first day of high school with the legendary Komi. He quickly realizes she isn’t aloof—she’s just super awkward. Now he’s made it his mission to help her on her quest to make 100 friends! (Source: VIZ Media) Notes: - Winner of the 67th Shogakukan Manga Award in the Shounen Category in 2021. - Includes 37 extra chapters.

Back then, Dok-Ja had no idea. He had no idea his favorite web novel 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse' was going to come to life, and that he would become the only person to know how the world was going to end. He also had no idea he would end up becoming the protagonist of this novel-turned-reality. Now, Dok-Ja will go on a journey to change the course of the story and save humankind once and for all.
(Source: WEBTOON, edited)
Osoraku Kanojo wa Ore no Aniki wo Neratteru

A high school guy who doesn't trust girls anymore has been tricked too many times by girls who just wanted to get close to his good-looking older brother. After all that, he decides he’ll never trust a girl again.
But then, a pretty girl in his class suddenly starts talking to him a lot. Is she just trying to get to his brother too…? Or does she actually mean something else? (Source: Manga Park, translated)
Ookami wa Tsuki ni Koi wo Suru

Ryuna Kamikawa is the beautiful and perfect-acting student council president. When she gets angry at her lazy vice-president, Yugi Tsukiyama, he likes to tease her by calling "wolf-senpai."

The two are like the light and dark sides of the moon, total opposites who don't get along. Until one day, when Tsukiyama discovers the hidden side of "Wolf Senpai" through his secret part-time job...?

This is the start of a love story between two people with hidden identities!

(Source: Ura Sunday, translated)

After illegal human replication services begin spreading through the underground, tragedy strikes, a plane crash takes the life of his newlywed wife. Consumed by grief and temptation, he faces an impossible question: Should he bring her back by copying her? But when memory, identity, and love can all be replicated, one unsettling doubt remains, is the person who returns truly her, or just a perfect imitation?
(Source: Webnovel)
